basic_details.job_title: Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Stenographer and Clerk/ Proof Readers
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh High Court Stenographer and Clerk/Proof Readers Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website https://hphighcourt.nic.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Himachal Pradesh High Court Stenographer and Clerk/Proof Readers Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation: Five (5) years relaxation in upper age limit admissible to bonafide SC of HP and persons with benchmark disabilities of HP. Age relaxation for HP Govt. employees as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation, 3 years experience as Stenographer/Steno-typist/Judgment Writer, 100 WPM English Stenography, 50 WPM English Typing, 30 WPM English Typing for Clerk
qualification.details: Stenographer (Group-C): Graduation with three (3) years’ experience as Steno-typist or Judgment Writer or Stenographer in any government office or reputed organisation. Speed of 100 W.P.M. in English Stenography and accurate transcription within 5 times the dictation time. Typing speed 50 W.P.M. in English on computers. Only 10% mistakes allowed. Clerk/Proof Readers (Group-C): Graduation from a recognised university. Must qualify Typing test at 30 WPM in English on computer after Screening Test.

salary_details.details: Stenographer (Group-C): Rs. 38,500-1,22,700/- Per Month Clerk/Proof Readers (Group-C): Rs. 20,200-64,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Competitive Examination Screening Test Written Test Typing Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Himachal Pradesh High Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Himachal Pradesh High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh High Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Himachal Pradesh High Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Himachal Pradesh High Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh High Court Vacancy 2026 Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Stenographer (Group-C): Graduation with three (3) years’ experience as Steno-typist or Judgment Writer or Stenographer in any government office or reputed organisation. Speed of 100 W.P.M. in English Stenography and accurate transcription within 5 times the dictation time. Typing speed 50 W.P.M. in English on computers. Only 10% mistakes allowed. Clerk/Proof Readers (Group-C): Graduation from a recognised university. Must qualify Typing test at 30 WPM in English on computer after Screening Test.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation: Five (5) years relaxation in upper age limit admissible to bonafide SC of HP and persons with benchmark disabilities of HP. Age relaxation for HP Govt. employees as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Stenographer (Group-C): Rs. 38,500-1,22,700/- Per Month Clerk/Proof Readers (Group-C): Rs. 20,200-64,000/- Per Month

rows.event: Closing Date of Online Application & Fee

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Competitive Examination Screening Test Written Test Typing Test Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Himachal Pradesh High Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Himachal Pradesh High Court to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Stenographer and Clerk/Proof Readers posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Stenographer and Clerk/Proof Readers posts in the Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026. One vacancy is for Stenographer and one is for Clerk/Proof Readers.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Stenographer post?
faq.answer: For the Stenographer post, candidates must have a Graduation degree with three years of experience as a Steno-typist or Judgment Writer or Stenographer. A speed of 100 WPM in English Stenography and 50 WPM in English typing is also required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the Clerk/Proof Readers post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Clerk/Proof Readers post must hold a Graduation degree from a recognized university. They also need to qualify a Typing test at 30 WPM in English on a computer.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Nil for General/OBC category candidates. For SC/ST category candidates, the fee is Rs. 300/- (including GST). Payment should be made online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Stenographer and Clerk/Proof Readers posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Stenographer (Group-C) is Rs. 38,500-1,22,700/- per month, and for Clerk/Proof Readers (Group-C) it is Rs. 20,200-64,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Competitive Examination, Screening Test, Written Test, Typing Test, and Document Verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for appointment.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a five (5) years relaxation in the upper age limit for bonafide SC of HP and persons with benchmark disabilities of HP. Age relaxation for HP Govt. employees is also applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the Important Links section of this article. You can also visit the official website of the Himachal Pradesh High Court for more details.

faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Himachal Pradesh High Court Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
